message:
fix(security): URL path injection prevention and empty string validation across all 10 new connectors

Systemic security fixes applied to all 10 connectors built this session:

1. **URL Path Injection Prevention**: Added sanitize_path_segment() to all
   client.rs files. Rejects path traversal sequences (/, \, .., %2f, %5c)
   in user-supplied URL path parameters (zone_id, record_id, bucket,
   instance_id, project_id, etc.)

2. **Empty String Validation**: Updated require_str() in all connector.rs
   files to reject empty/whitespace-only strings, preventing malformed
   API requests from empty inputs.

Affected connectors: cloudflare, vercel, supabase, aws, gcp, azure,
netlify, dockerhub, shopify, paypal (621+ tests pass across all)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
